👋 Welcome to Exam Tracker
Apna naam likho — group ke baaki members isi naam se tumhara progress dekh payenge.
Tumhara Naam
ya
⬇️ Install APK (Android)
📲 App Ki Tarah Install Karo
ya
⬇️ Install APK (Android)
❓ App Kaise Use Karein
Neeche 6 tabs hain — har tab ka kaam ek line mein:
🏠
Home — Streak, paisa aur progress yahan dikhta hai, sirf dekhne ke liye. 🧊 Streak Freeze: 50% se kam ho to freeze apne aap streak bacha leta hai (max 2) — calendar mein 🧊 se dikhta hai.
🔍
Search — Weak tab ke dono sub-tabs (📚 Weak / 🔁 Revise) ke top search box se chapter/topic turant dhoondho.
🎯
Today — Sabse zaroori tab. Roz yahan aake apne din ke tasks ✅ tick karo, aur mock/sectional test ka score bharo.
🧪
Score — Pre/Mains Mock aur Sectional tests log karo (score, right-wrong-skip, weak chapter). Overall Analysis mein avg, percentile — sab ek jagah.
📚
Weak — Do buttons: 📚 Weak (galat question ke chapter pe +1 karo, weakest chapter pata chal jayega) aur 🔁 Revise (revise kiye topic pe "✅ +1" karo, kam-revised topic top pe dikhega).
🤝
Rank — Dost ka Room Code daal ke ek dusre ka progress compare kar sakte ho.
📊
Stats — Charts, backup code, notifications aur data reset — sab settings yahan milengi.
Ye "❓" button top mein hamesha rahega — jab bhi bhool jao, yahin se dobara dekh sakte ho.
Aaj ka target select karo, study shuru karne ke liye
Target ka poora time complete hote hi wo Today tab mein apne aap ✅ tick ho jayega.
